codeReview.summary: The feature mostly implements the requested runtime bootstrap switch and test hook, but one blocking contract mismatch remains in createProfile relay validation.

issues.description: With `__iglooTestAllowInsecureRelayForRestore` enabled, `createProfile` allows both `ws://127.0.0.1:*` and `ws://localhost:*`. The feature contract/VAL-FOLLOWUP-010 scopes the DEV insecure exception to `ws://127.0.0.1:*`; accepting `localhost` broadens the allowlist to a non-specified ws:// URL.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The assigned `protocol-flow-worker` skill is scoped to source-side onboarding sponsorship ceremonies and mandates agent-browser validation, but this feature is a createProfile relay-bootstrap fix and the reviewed transcript skeleton does not show agent-browser execution.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/protocol-flow-worker/SKILL.md:3,13,19-21,47,58 describe onboarding-sponsorship + mandatory agent-browser workflow; worker transcript skeleton for session fcb0146c-3932-4fa1-9250-cd6a47ca4262 shows skill calls to mission-worker-base/protocol-flow-worker and CLI vitest/tsc work, with no agent-browser step.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission shared guidance for `__iglooTestAllowInsecureRelayForRestore` is now stale after this feature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/plebdev/.factory/missions/b48100dd-0e6c-4a7c-90a3-f12e61d1c3c4/AGENTS.md:17 says the flag is for restoreProfileFromRelay only and "is NOT read anywhere else", but the reviewed commit reads it in createProfile relay validation (`src/app/AppStateProvider.tsx` around lines 1693-1699 in commit 9be2e00...).

summary: Review failed due to one blocking requirement mismatch: DEV insecure relay allowlisting at createProfile is broader than the specified `ws://127.0.0.1:*` exception. I also noted shared-state gaps around skill fit and AGENTS guidance drift.
